DATABASE_URL.description: Supabase Session pooler DSN. Required for prepare.py and the experiment loop. Set as a User secret at https://github.com/settings/codespaces or as a Repo secret in the GitHub repo settings. Format: postgresql://postgres.<ref>:<URL_ENCODED_PASSWORD>@aws-<n>-<region>.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Optional. Required only when the AI fallback layer is wired (Phase 12). Leave unset for Phases 1-10.
